name: 鞭刑懲罰場
description: 極端的肉體懲罰場景在豪門宅邸內進行，家族私刑的野蠻與豪門外表的文明形成強烈反諷，將階級壓迫推到極致。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: This punishment is necessary. Michelle, you will get 30 lashes. ... Keep going. Just say it. Just say it, please. For the love of God, just say it and I can stop.
examples.context: 極端的肉體懲罰場景在豪門宅邸內進行，家族私刑的野蠻與豪門外表的文明形成強烈反諷，將階級壓迫推到極致。
